data.title: Snap Inc. announced pricing of $550M upsized senior notes due 2034, exempt from registration. Sale expected to close on August 12, 2025.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, Snap Inc. (NYSE: SNAP) has revealed the pricing for $550 million in 6.875% senior notes due in 2034 in a private offering exempt from Securities Act of 1933 registration. The sale, slated for closure on August 12, 2025, pending customary conditions, will establish the notes as Snap's senior unsecured responsibilities.

Fortescue secured a ¥14.2 billion ($2B) five-year loan, the first of its kind for an Australian corporate, to fund decarbonization projects. The financing, backed by Chinese and global banks, highlights Fortescue’s continued green energy push despite recent project scale-backs.

data.title: Hagerty increases secondary offering to 9.7 million Class A Common Stock shares. 🚗📈 #Hagerty #NYSE #Automotive
data.description: A Michigan-based company, Hagerty, Inc. (NYSE: HGTY), known for its specialty vehicle insurance services and automotive enthusiast products, revealed the details of its recent secondary offering. The offering, originally planned for a set number of shares, was increased to 9,700,000 shares of Hagerty's Class A Common Stock. Hagerty is a prominent player in the industry and is well-recognized for its focus on catering to the needs of specialty vehicle owners.

Disney settled Gina Carano’s wrongful termination lawsuit over her firing from The Mandalorian, with terms undisclosed. Lucasfilm says it’s open to future work with Carano after resolving the dispute backed by Elon Musk.

data.title: Lundin Gold's Q2 2025 saw record revenues of $453M, net income of $197M, and free cash flow of $236M. Gold production: 139,433 ounces, sold at avg. price of $3,361 per ounce. Dividends of $0.79/share paid. Lundin Gold elevated production guidance to 490,000 oz from 475,000 oz for 2025. Quarterly dividend of $0.30/share plus $0.49/share to be paid at the end of Q3. Lundin Gold remains financially strong.
data.description: Lundin Gold Inc. reported exceptional financial results for Q2 of 2025, including record revenues of $453 million, net income of $197 million ($0.82 per share), and free cash flow of $236 million ($0.98 per share). Gold production was strong at 139,433 ounces, with 136,737 ounces sold at an average price of $3,361 per ounce. Cash operating costs were $756 per ounce, and all-in sustaining costs were $927 per ounce sold. The Company announced cash dividends totaling $0.79 per share, with a fixed quarterly dividend of $0.30 and a variable quarterly dividend of $0.49, to be paid at the end of the third quarter. Lundin Gold's CEO highlighted the operational excellence driving these results and increased the lower end of the 2025 production guidance to 490,000 ounces. The financial performance also allowed for strategic investments and a return of capital to shareholders. Lundin Gold is in a strong financial position for continued success.
IRESS IN TALKS WITH BLACKSTONE, THOMA BRAVO ON POTENTIAL BIDS

data.title: Amtrak's NextGen Acela high-speed train debuts on August 28, connecting Boston to Washington, DC. #EastCoastTravel
data.description: A state-of-the-art high-speed rail service is set to revolutionize travel between Boston and Washington, DC. Commencing on Thursday, August 28, 2025, passengers will have the opportunity to experience the NextGen Acela by Amtrak – a cutting-edge train service that promises to transform travel along the East Coast. This innovative transportation system will significantly reduce travel times, making it the preferred choice for commuters and travelers alike. This development marks a milestone in transportation, showcasing the commitment to enhancing connectivity and efficiency in the region.

data.title: Over 400 global buyers and investors to attend Costa Rica Trade & Investment Summit, with participation of 1,000 companies.
data.description: The upcoming Costa Rica Trade & Investment Summit is set to gather over 1,000 companies, establishing the country as a key hub for trade and investment. For further details and to register, visit www.costaricasummit.com. Taking place in SAN JOSÉ, Costa Rica, the event kicks off on September 1, 2025.

data.title: Executive order bans debanking of crypto industry post termination of Operation Chokepoint 2.0, per White House.
data.description: The White House has announced the conclusion of Operation Chokepoint 2.0, stating that the initiative has been terminated. The administration argued that the operation had been unjust towards the digital assets sector.
